turns.content: My favorite coffee order is a flat white.
Got it, a flat white is your favorite.
I switched my go-to coffee. These days I always order an oat milk latte instead of a flat white.
Noted, an oat milk latte is now your usual.

questions.question: What is my current favorite coffee order?

turns.content: I'm allergic to peanuts, so please keep that in mind for any recipes.
Understood, I'll avoid peanuts.
Actually I was wrong earlier. I'm not allergic to peanuts, I'm allergic to tree nuts like almonds and cashews.
Thanks for the correction, tree nuts it is.

questions.question: Which nuts am I actually allergic to?

turns.content: I started a new job at Acme Corp today.
Congrats on the new role at Acme Corp.
Two weeks in at Acme and the onboarding is finally done.
Glad onboarding wrapped up.

questions.question: On what date did I start my job at Acme Corp?

turns.content: I'm planning a trip to Lisbon next month.
Lisbon sounds great.
For that trip I mentioned, I'll be traveling with my sister Maria.
Noted, you and Maria are going.

questions.question: Who am I traveling to Lisbon with?

turns.content: I just adopted a dog named Rex.
Congrats on adopting Rex.

questions.question: What breed is my dog Rex?
questions.answer: The breed of Rex was never mentioned in the conversations.

turns.content: My daughter's birthday is on the 14th of July.
I'll remember her birthday is July 14.
